methodology: Goal-conditioned controller test. Test states drawn from trajectories under two policies on the same PongWorld.render(128) renderer: in-dist = AI-tracked paddles with noise(0, 0.15), OOD = uniform random paddle actions. For each viable state (ball heading toward AI, not past paddle), restore env, run JEPA paddle policy for horizon*frameskip physics steps, measure success = ball's ball_vx flipped positive (AI returned) before ball.x < 0 (scored against AI).
